message:
test: add tests for BundleCard and LegalPageLayout components

2 new test files covering 26 tests:
- BundleCard: title/description/version rendering, prompt count, overflow indicator,
  featured badge, install copy, View link, workflow display, error handling
- LegalPageLayout: title/date/version, table of contents, sidebar links,
  contact email, print button, icon variants, mobile TOC

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
